source.license_notes: Source data states SourceAttribution: Public Domain. No LICENSE file in repo. Issue #59 filed with maintainer to confirm.

notes: Proof texts in Creeds.json are already OSIS format -- raw and osis fields are identical.
Some proof texts are chapter-level refs (e.g. Gen.1, Lev.18) rather than verse-level.
ContentWithProofs preserved as content_with_proofs on each section unit.
